shortdesc.p: This content has links to training and resources that will help you get up to speed on CDE Analytics. Use these to help you understand how to navigate and use CDE Analytics, how to read and interpret reports and metrics, and how to apply the knowledge.

topicmeta.shortdesc: This content has links to training and resources that will help you get up to speed on CDE Analytics. Use these to help you understand how to navigate and use CDE Analytics, how to read and interpret reports and metrics, and how to apply the knowledge.

shortdesc.p: This chapter covers the following initial procedure that you need to perform before using Nuance CDE.

topicmeta.shortdesc: This chapter covers the following initial procedure that you need to perform before using Nuance CDE.

shortdesc.p: Follow the steps given below to enable the Dragon Medical One Web Extension on Google Chrome browser.

topicmeta.shortdesc: Follow the steps given below to enable the Dragon Medical One Web Extension on Google Chrome browser.

topic.title: Live Chat Settings for Chrome Browser

topicmeta.navtitle: Live Chat Settings for Chrome Browser
topicmeta.linktext: Live Chat Settings for Chrome Browser

shortdesc.p: This section describes how you can sign-in to Nuance CDE for the first time.

topicmeta.shortdesc: This section describes how you can sign-in to Nuance CDE for the first time.

shortdesc.p: This section describes how you can sign-in to Nuance CDE.

shortdesc.p: This section describes about how to log out from the Nuance CDE.

topicmeta.shortdesc: This section describes about how to log out from the Nuance CDE.

topic.title: Adding Fields on the Custom Report

topicmeta.navtitle: Adding Fields on the Custom Report
topicmeta.linktext: Adding Fields on the Custom Report

shortdesc.p: User has the ability to create custom reports on Notes created for the encounter.

topicmeta.shortdesc: User has the ability to create custom reports on Notes created for the encounter.

shortdesc.p: The fields listed below are available in the CDE One and CDE Triage reports for custom reporting. Please note that this list does not include the fields available in the near-real time CDS General/ CDS Productivity report.

topicmeta.shortdesc: The fields listed below are available in the CDE One and CDE Triage reports for custom reporting. Please note that this list does not include the fields available in the near-real time CDS General/ CDS Productivity report.
